latestStories.title: The ultimate weekend in East Cork, Ireland
description: When most visitors arrive in County Cork in the south of Ireland, they tend to head straight to the craggy Beara Peninsula in West Cork, with its stunning coastal views, or to the famous pubs and food markets of Cork City. Yet those who venture east from the county capital will find plenty of sights and activities to fill a rewarding weekend – from coastal walks to foodie stops – and fewer fellow visitors to share them with.

I’m a Dubliner, and this visit to East Cork was my first ever venture to the county; I left a few days later, absolutely blown away by the views, the flavors and the friendliness. From stunning cliffside walking and local markets to world-class restaurants and historic buildings, East Cork entices at every bend in the road.
Whether you reach Cork by plane, train or road, here’s how to spend an ultimate weekend in East Cork, taking full advantage of its friendly towns and villages and gorgeous scenery.

latestStories.title: How to get around New York City
description: Navigating New York City can seem overwhelming at first, but once you understand the transportation system, getting around becomes surprisingly efficient. The subway operates 24/7 and connects all major boroughs, making it the backbone of the city’s transport network.

Buses are a great option for shorter distances and offer scenic views of neighborhoods you might miss underground. For convenience, taxis and ride-sharing services are available throughout the city, especially useful late at night or when carrying luggage.

Walking remains one of the best ways to truly experience New York. From Central Park to Times Square and Brooklyn’s waterfront, each street tells a story. With proper planning and a MetroCard or digital pass, you can explore the city like a local and make the most of your trip.

latestStories.title: The best things to do in Alaska with kids
description: Alaska offers a unique playground for families looking to combine adventure with education. From spotting whales and bears in their natural habitats to exploring glaciers, kids are introduced to nature in its most raw and exciting form.

Family-friendly activities include guided wildlife tours, scenic train rides through breathtaking landscapes, and visits to interactive museums where children can learn about Alaska’s history and culture. National parks like Denali provide unforgettable outdoor experiences suitable for all ages.

Whether it’s kayaking through icy waters, enjoying a dog sledding experience, or simply taking in the stunning views, Alaska creates lasting memories for families seeking something beyond the ordinary vacation.

latestStories.title: New York City's 11 best museums
description: New York City stands as a global hub for art, history and culture, offering an impressive range of museums that cater to every interest. From iconic institutions like The Metropolitan Museum of Art to contemporary spaces like MoMA, the city provides endless opportunities for discovery.

Visitors can explore everything from ancient artifacts and classical paintings to cutting-edge installations and scientific exhibitions. The American Museum of Natural History, for example, offers immersive experiences that captivate both adults and children alike.

Many museums also host temporary exhibitions, workshops and guided tours, ensuring there’s always something new to see. Whether you’re an art enthusiast or a curious traveler, New York’s museums promise a rich and inspiring journey.

latestStories.title: 10 of London's best museums
description: London is home to some of the world’s most renowned museums, many of which offer free entry, making them accessible to everyone. The British Museum showcases artifacts spanning thousands of years, while Tate Modern brings contemporary art to life in a striking industrial setting.

The Natural History Museum is a favorite among families, featuring fascinating exhibits on dinosaurs, space and the natural world. Meanwhile, the Victoria and Albert Museum highlights design, fashion and decorative arts from around the globe.

With such a diverse selection, London’s museums cater to every curiosity. Whether you're diving into history, exploring artistic expression, or engaging with science, each visit offers a deeper understanding of the world.

Destinations.about: Machu Picchu is a breathtaking ancient Incan citadel nestled high in the Andes Mountains, offering a perfect blend of history, mystery, and natural beauty.
